issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: real-time-voice-assistant-transcription
scenarios.rationale: A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while B lacks explicit confirmation of required options and event handling.

scenarios.name: pre-recorded-meeting-transcription-with-summary
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets most rubric requirements using Deepgram and prints utterances with confidence, but omits overall confidence and full transcript; Response B uses a different service entirely.
